user.description: Connect to your Tandoor Recipes instance. Create an API token in Tandoor under Settings → API.

data_description.url: The base URL of your Tandoor instance, e.g. http://192.168.1.4:9926
data_description.api_token: A Tandoor API token with read/write scope

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Tandoor. Check the URL.

abort.already_configured: This Tandoor instance is already configured.
